T.description: Lifetime of a communication system (in hours) with the given probability density function, used to compute the CDF values F(1) and F(2) in the conditional probability calculation.

t1.description: The conditioning time point (1 hour), representing the time the unit has already survived; used to evaluate F(1) in the conditional probability formula.

t2.description: The event time point (2 hours), representing the upper bound of the failure interval; used to evaluate F(2) in the conditional probability formula.
